title: SOPHIAS smartwatch orientation schema
description: Schema for smartwatch orientation data collected from Fitbit Sense smartwatches through Watch-DMLT during a presentation session. Each record contains a local datetime string, a UNIX timestamp for synchronization, and the four orientation components describing the device orientation.

Fecha.description: Local date and time at which the orientation sample was recorded, stored as a human-readable datetime string.

Timestamp.description: UNIX timestamp associated with the orientation sample, expressed in milliseconds. This field can be used to align the smartwatch signal with other timestamped SOPHIAS modalities.

Orientación: w.description: Scalar component of the smartwatch orientation quaternion.

x.description: X component of the smartwatch orientation quaternion.

y.description: Y component of the smartwatch orientation quaternion.

z.description: Z component of the smartwatch orientation quaternion.
